title: agasulis tingitana
intro: Agasulis tingitana, also known as Thyme, is a low-growing, perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. Thyme has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial and antifungal properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce inflammation, and alleviate respiratory issues. The health benefits of Thyme include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress, and improve digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Thyme can be prepared as a tea, oil, or infused in honey, and it is also commonly used as a culinary herb in cooking and as a natural preservative.
